report.hypothesis: Optimal SSTR2 binders require balance between energetic favorability and structural validity, not extreme ddG values

proposed_changes.rationale: Current ddG threshold is too restrictive, forcing overly negative energies that correlate with poor structural quality metrics
Excessive clash tolerance may allow poorly packed structures that depress pLDDT and docking scores
